title: guaiacum hygrometrum
intro: Guaiacum hygrometrum, also known as the small or dwarf guaiac, is a species of flowering plant in the family Zygophyllaceae. It is native to the Caribbean and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis and respiratory issues. Guaiacum hygrometrum can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or salve, and is often used to promote wound healing and reduce pain and swelling.
